Home → Discography → Thugs Revenge

Thugs Revenge

2006 · Hi Power Entertainment

Released on February 28, 2006, via Hi Power Entertainment, Thugs Revenge is a 16-track gangsta rap album that marries Bizzy Bone's signature chopper flow with West Coast Chicano rap production. The project was one out of four solo releases Bizzy dropped that year alone, during a turbulent period of estrangement from Bone Thugs-N-Harmony, from which he had been expelled in 2003. The album remains beloved by some devoted fans as a return to his hardcore roots. The Mr. Criminal–dominated production gave Bizzy a polished, G-Funk–inflected canvas distinct from anything else in his catalog.

"Everybody on the West Side, My papito, mamacita in the barrio, Tequila my amigo."

— When We Ride
01 Thugs Revenge (Intro) produced by Mr Criminal ▷
02 Ridin in the Streets produced by Mr Criminal feat. Layzie Bone & Mr Criminal ▷
03 Caught Up produced by Mr Criminal feat. Bad Azz ▷
04 When We Ride produced by Fingazz feat. Mr Criminal ▷
05 Get Ya, Get Ya produced by Mr Criminal ▷
06 All My Life produced by Mr Criminal feat. Mr Criminal & Mr Capone-E ▷
07 Feel My Soul produced by Mr Criminal ▷
08 Gold Digger (Skit) produced by Mr Criminal ▷
09 Jealousy Breeds Envy produced by Mr Criminal ▷
10 Light Up the Spliff produced by Mr Criminal ▷
11 Never Be Hesitant produced by Mr Criminal ▷
12 A Thugs Prayer produced by Mr Criminal ▷
13 What Are We Seeing produced by Mr Criminal ▷
14 Don't Be Fake produced by Mr Criminal ▷
15 For the Homies produced by Mr Criminal feat. Mr Capone-E, Mr Silent & K.O. ▷
16 Hi Power Mega Mixx 2006 produced by Mr Criminal ▷
